log: === INITIATIVE ===

→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: SUCCESS

→ Heals Shifter — Unarmored Caster for 8. HP: 28/67
=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 32 damage. Shifter — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
